utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the number of required items from the format. The format lists: 1) health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), 2) property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), 3) travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), 4) additional_services (any enhancement services with costs), 5) total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). This totals 5 items.
Step 2: Compare with the final coverage plan.
- health_coverage: Present, includes both physical and mental, each with plan name, cost/month, cost/year, and description — fully specified.
- property_coverage: Present, plan name, monthly and annual cost, coverage details — fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present, plan name and add-on, monthly and annual costs for each, coverage specifics — fully specified.
- additional_services: Present, service description, monthly and annual costs — fully specified.
- total_budget: Present, monthly and annual total — fully specified.
Step 3: All 5 items in the required format are present and contain all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the AI assistant's final coverage plan to the corresponding ground-truth rating.
